title: Pan-Seared Pak Choi with Crunchy Skillet Crust
description: A simple and flavorful pak choi dish with a crunchy skillet crust, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: intense
ingredients.notes: such as chili flakes or soy sauce

ingredients.name: crunchy
ingredients.notes: such as chopped nuts or seeds

instructions: Heat the skillet in a pan over medium heat.
Add the brazilian oil and crunchy ingredients to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown.
Add the intense ingredients to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the pak choi to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional crunchy ingredients if desired.
